title: schenkia spicata
intro: Schenkia spicata, also known as the Chinese lavender or schenkia, is a flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Schenkia spicata include its ability to relieve stress, promote sleep, and soothe digestive issues. Schenkia spicata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its calming effects.
